demos.title: 48 contracts learning mission
demos.objective: I want AGI agents to help me understand the 48 Ethereum Mainnet contracts.

demos.title: Public-safe proof mission
demos.objective: I want to run a public-safe proof mission.

demos.title: Vendor evidence review
demos.objective: I want to evaluate an AI vendor using evidence, not marketing claims.

demos.title: Loop → RSI governance review
demos.objective: I want to understand Loop to RSI governance.

demos.title: End-to-end autonomous example
demos.objective: I want a complete end-to-end example from objective to agents to proof to validation to Chronicle.

useCases.title: Understand GoalOS in 10 minutes
useCases.prompt: I am new and want the fastest path to understand GoalOS.
useCases.why: A non-technical user gets a short path instead of a giant site map.

useCases.title: Learn the 48 Ethereum Mainnet contracts
useCases.prompt: I want AGI agents to help me understand the 48 Ethereum Mainnet contracts.
useCases.why: Turns Mainnet infrastructure into a friendly learning path.

useCases.title: Run a public-safe proof mission
useCases.prompt: I want to run a public-safe proof mission with no user data, no wallet, and no external action.
useCases.why: Shows GoalOS as proof-to-action, not just static content.

useCases.title: Evaluate an AI vendor with evidence
useCases.prompt: I want to evaluate an AI vendor using evidence, not marketing claims.
useCases.why: Converts subjective vendor comparison into claim-bound proof review.

useCases.title: Design a controlled pilot program
useCases.prompt: I want to design a controlled pilot where every serious pilot ends with a docket.
useCases.why: Makes adoption safer: define scope, proof, rollback, and review before scaling.

useCases.title: Understand Loop → RSI governance
useCases.prompt: I want to understand how long-running loops become deterministic RSI governance.
useCases.why: Routes the user into deterministic invention governance with hard gates.

useCases.title: Check privacy, token, and data boundaries
useCases.prompt: I want AGI agents to check privacy, token, and no-data boundaries across the website.
useCases.why: Makes the trust boundary concrete and auditable.

useCases.title: Review or replay a proof claim
useCases.prompt: I want to review a public GoalOS proof claim and understand what evidence supports it.
useCases.why: Teaches users to ask for dockets, baselines, replay, risks, and claims matrix.

useCases.title: Turn accepted work into reusable capability
useCases.prompt: I want to see how accepted work becomes reusable capability.
useCases.why: Shows the compounding loop from one proof to future work.

useCases.title: Audit website and repository completeness
useCases.prompt: I want AGI agents to audit the website and repository completeness.
useCases.why: Gives maintainers a route QA path that users understand.

useCases.title: Plan a defensive cybersecurity proof mission
useCases.prompt: I want to plan a defensive cybersecurity proof mission for a repo-owned, public-safe review.
useCases.why: Shows security value while preserving no external scans and no exploit execution.

useCases.title: Prepare an executive decision brief
useCases.prompt: I want an executive brief that turns a GoalOS objective into options, risks, proof, and next steps.
useCases.why: Makes GoalOS useful to leaders who need decisions, not raw traces.

useCases.title: Create a proof-backed procurement record
useCases.prompt: I want to create a proof-backed procurement record for an AI tool.
useCases.why: Procurement becomes evidence-backed and reviewable.

useCases.title: Audit a research or strategic claim
useCases.prompt: I want to audit a research or strategic claim before publishing it.
useCases.why: Prevents unsupported claims from becoming institutional defaults.

useCases.title: Prepare a Validator Council review
useCases.prompt: I want to prepare a Validator Council review session for a high-novelty GoalOS claim.
useCases.why: Shows governance escalation for strategic or high-novelty claims.

useCases.title: Map a strategic opportunity into a proof mission
useCases.prompt: I want to map a strategic opportunity into a public-safe proof mission.
useCases.why: Turns vague strategy into bounded proof work.

useCases.title: Build a Mainnet proof-rail learning path
useCases.prompt: I want to build a learning path from the 48 contracts to proof-governed AI work.
useCases.why: Links contracts to user comprehension and proof workflow.

useCases.title: Prepare external reviewer replay
useCases.prompt: I want to prepare an external reviewer replay packet.
useCases.why: Turns internal work into something an outsider can inspect.

useCases.title: Create an AGI Node handoff packet
useCases.prompt: I want to create an AGI Node handoff packet for deterministic public-safe validation.
useCases.why: Makes AGI Nodes understandable and actionable.

useCases.title: Prepare a safe launch Evidence Docket
useCases.prompt: I want to prepare an Evidence Docket for a public launch.
useCases.why: Launch becomes claim-bound and review-ready.

useCases.title: Convert a mission into Chronicle memory
useCases.prompt: I want to convert a mission into Chronicle memory.
useCases.why: Shows how accepted work compounds rather than disappearing.

useCases.title: Create an AGI Jobs-style work package
useCases.prompt: I want to create an AGI Jobs-style work package from one objective.
useCases.why: Explains the Work OS layer to non-technical users.

useCases.title: Council review for Move-37 candidate
useCases.prompt: I want to prepare Council review for a Move-37 candidate.
useCases.why: High novelty raises skepticism and requires dossier packaging.

useCases.title: Build a safe proof demo from an objective
useCases.prompt: I want to build a safe proof demo from one objective.
useCases.why: Helps users create demos that are useful but claim-bounded.

useCases.title: Choose the right agent topology
useCases.prompt: I want to choose the right agent topology for my proof mission.
useCases.why: Prevents unnecessary swarms and teaches role discipline.

useCases.title: Evaluate partnership diligence
useCases.prompt: I want AGI agents to help prepare evidence-based partnership diligence.
useCases.why: Turns partnership hype into claims, risks, evidence, and review path.

useCases.title: Create a risk ledger for a strategic claim
useCases.prompt: I want to create a risk ledger for a strategic GoalOS claim.
useCases.why: Shows risk as first-class evidence.

useCases.title: Compare AI policy options
useCases.prompt: I want to compare AI policy options using GoalOS proof discipline.
useCases.why: Gives policy users a structured decision route.

useCases.title: Build-vs-buy AI decision
useCases.prompt: I want to decide whether to build or buy an AI system using evidence.
useCases.why: Concrete executive use case with useful outputs.

useCases.title: Turn a workflow into a reusable SOP
useCases.prompt: I want to turn a repeatable workflow into a reusable SOP with proof gates.
useCases.why: Converts work into institution-grade reusable process.

useCases.title: Teach a new team member GoalOS
useCases.prompt: I want a new teammate to understand GoalOS quickly.
useCases.why: Turns onboarding into a guided proof curriculum.

useCases.title: Prepare a release readiness packet
useCases.prompt: I want to prepare a release readiness packet for a GoalOS page.
useCases.why: Makes release review concrete and safe.

useCases.title: Explain AGI Jobs + Nodes + Chronicle
useCases.prompt: I want AGI agents to explain AGI Jobs, AGI Nodes, and Chronicle with a runnable example.
useCases.why: Makes the original stack understandable.

useCases.title: Plan an end-to-end autonomous example
useCases.prompt: I want a complete end-to-end example from objective to agents to proof to validation to Chronicle.
useCases.why: This is the signature demo for non-technical users.

useCases.title: Validate Ask GoalOS routing
useCases.prompt: I want AGI agents to validate Ask GoalOS routing.
useCases.why: Checks that the assistant sends users to the right pages.

useCases.title: Create a public-safe research spine
useCases.prompt: I want to create a research spine that is claim-bounded and useful.
useCases.why: Helps turn research into proof-aligned navigation.

useCases.title: Prepare human-governed remediation
useCases.prompt: I want to prepare human-governed remediation from an evidence finding.
useCases.why: Shows how agents propose, but humans approve high-impact changes.

useCases.title: Create a proof metrics dashboard
useCases.prompt: I want to create a simple proof metrics dashboard for a mission.
useCases.why: Turns progress into visible metrics users can understand.

useCases.title: Prepare an institution onboarding path
useCases.prompt: I want to onboard an institution into GoalOS without asking for sensitive data.
useCases.why: Makes adoption practical and safe.

useCases.title: Create an external public explainer
useCases.prompt: I want to create a public explainer that shows what GoalOS does without overclaiming.
useCases.why: Useful for communication while preserving proof discipline.
